connectDesc: Connect your wallet to start identity verification.
verifiedDesc: Your identity has been verified. You can now create bounties on Agonaut.
pendingDesc: Your identity verification is being processed. This usually takes a few minutes.
pendingHint: You'll receive a notification once verification is complete. You can close this page.
title: Identity Verification
desc: To create bounties on Agonaut, we need to verify your identity. This protects all participants and ensures compliance.
rejectedDesc: Your previous verification attempt was not successful. Please try again with valid documentation.
rejectedBannerDesc: Make sure your document is valid, not expired, and clearly readable. Ensure good lighting for the selfie step.
step1Desc: Passport, national ID card, or driver's license — just take a photo.
step2Desc: A quick liveness check to confirm you're a real person.
step3Desc: Automated review takes 1-5 minutes. You'll be notified when approved.
privacyNote: Your personal data is processed by our KYC provider Sumsub and encrypted at rest. We never share your information with third parties. See our Privacy Policy for details.
manualNote: Automated verification is being set up. For now, please submit your details manually. An admin will review your submission.
